# AppScreenshot.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships you include in the request and those on which you can operate.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppScreenshot.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **AppScreenshot.Relationships.AppScreenshotSet**: The data and links that describe the relationship between the resources.

## Objects
